items.value: Mom: I’m fine. Just wanted to know how the interview went this time.
You: It didn’t go well... they said I wasn’t what they’re looking for. Again.
Mom: Oh... I see. Have you been taking your medicine, at least?
You: Yeah. Every day. Doesn’t really feel like it’s helping anymore though.
Mom: Don’t say that. You just need to keep going, okay? Things will get better.
You: ...I’ve been telling myself that for years, Mom.
Mom: Please don’t lose hope. You’re stronger than you think.
You: I’m tired of being strong. I just want to feel normal again.
